concepts.name: GameModuleBoundary
concepts.definition: Entry boundary where RogueGame implements the engine-facing gameplay interface.
concepts.boundary: Engine-facing module entry, lifecycle callbacks, and runtime ownership handoff.

concepts.name: GameCallbacksBoundary
concepts.definition: Reverse callback surface used by combat, ai, and effect helpers to notify the coordinator.
concepts.boundary: Reverse callback surface from combat helpers into coordinator events and feedback requests.

concepts.name: SkillUpgradeCatalog
concepts.definition: Load policy for gameplay upgrade definitions from component JSON or legacy fallback JSON.
concepts.boundary: Gameplay upgrade catalog loading from component json, legacy json, and builtin fallback.

concepts.name: UIScreenCopyCatalog
concepts.definition: Manifest-driven UI copy source for titles, prompts, footer strings, and fallback text.
concepts.boundary: Manifest-driven ui copy source for titles, prompts, footer strings, and fallback text.

concepts.name: LocalizationCatalog
concepts.definition: Localized string tables consumed through the engine localization service.
concepts.boundary: Localized string tables with key fallback and template replacement through engine localization.

concepts.name: GameSettingsDocument
concepts.definition: Saved config document for fps display and performance recording preferences.
concepts.boundary: Saved config for fps display, auto perf recording, and config file persistence.

concepts.name: AssetPathStrategy
concepts.definition: Resolution rule that prefers packaged assets and falls back to development asset paths.
concepts.boundary: Packaged-versus-dev content path selection for shared binaries and assets.

concepts.name: NavigationAdapter
concepts.definition: Game wrapper around engine crowd navigation and gameplay telemetry collection.
concepts.boundary: Wrapper around engine crowd navigation, path stats, and enemy steering requests.

concepts.name: AudioRequestQueue
concepts.definition: Coordinator-owned queue of sound requests handed to the engine audio layer.
concepts.boundary: Coordinator-owned sound request queue for hit, reward, and ui playback intents.

concepts.name: PerformanceRecord
concepts.definition: Debug capture stream for frame metrics exported to JSON and CSV.
concepts.boundary: Debug frame metrics export to json and csv under saved diagnostics folders.

concepts.name: SpawnZoneActivation
concepts.definition: Coordinator-side operation that turns encounter-zone tags and generator tags on or off for the active room.
concepts.boundary: Coordinator operation that turns zone tags and generator tags on or off for the active room.

concepts.name: SpawnPayloadAdapter
concepts.definition: Game-side adapter that resolves generic payload entries into enemies, interactables, or scripted runtime actors.
concepts.boundary: Resolver layer that materializes generic entries as enemy actors, interactables, or scripted entities.

concepts.name: SpawnTelemetry
concepts.definition: Balancing record of source usage, composition mix, denied requests, and pressure outcomes during a stage.
concepts.boundary: Balancing record of generator usage, composition mix, pressure peaks, and denied requests.
